title: airella capillaris
intro: Airella capillaris, also known as sea club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is often found in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Airella capillaris include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Airella capillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
